title: acinos alpinus subsp. granatensis
intro: Acinos alpinus subsp. granatensis, also known as alpine thyme or mountain thyme, is a subspecies of plant in the mint family that is native to the Iberian Peninsula. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin infections. The health benefits of Acinos alpinus subsp. granatensis include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial agent, which can help to reduce pain, inflammation, and improve overall well-being. Herbal preparations of Acinos alpinus subsp. granatensis include teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to treat various health conditions and promote relaxation and stress relief.
